name: ilamy
description: Monorepo for @ilamy/calendar and its plugin ecosystem.
author: Sujeet Kc

scripts.dev:website: bun run build:lib && bun run --filter '@ilamy/website' dev
scripts.deploy:website: bun run build:lib && bun run --filter '@ilamy/website' deploy
scripts.build: bun run --filter '@ilamy/types' --filter '@ilamy/utils' --if-present build && bun run --filter '@ilamy/ui' --if-present build && bun run --filter '@ilamy/calendar-recurrence' --filter '@ilamy/calendar-agenda' --if-present build && bun run --filter '@ilamy/calendar' --if-present build && bun run --filter '@ilamy/demo' --if-present build && bun run --filter '@ilamy/website' --if-present build
scripts.ci: bun run check && bun run build && bun run type-check && bun run test
scripts.release: bun run build:lib && bun run publish:lib
scripts.release:dry: bun run build:lib && cd packages/calendar && bun publish --dry-run
